name: plugin lifecycle: /self-test runs /doctor + additional invariants (lock-file integrity, audit-chain verify, source-folder validate-all)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/self-test.sh" 2>out.txt && grep -E "doctor:" out.txt 1>&2 && grep -E "audit-chain:" out.txt 1>&2 && grep -E "validate-all:" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
